title: Don Krieg Falls
scene: On pages 2–5, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Luffy finally shatters Krieg’s pride and ends the battle at the Baratie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's too early for celebra- Tions yet!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You can't escape from my iron net!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: The one who laughs at the end is always me!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Below us is the sea! The fight is over, hammer brat!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: All I have to do is drag you down under and you'll drown to your death!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirates
dialogue.text: That's the Don We All Know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As long as I can still stretch my arms and legs,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's still trying to fight!? But the ocean should be his weak point!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He doesn't hesitate at all.!.! Not even for an instant...! x

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's with this guy!? Despite my countless of weapons...!

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
